# Spock Framework Documentation

> Spock is a testing and specification framework for Java and Groovy applications.
> Compose a documentation page URL from the template below using any version and page slug.

Template: https://spockframework.org/spock/docs/{version}/{page}.md
Example:  https://spockframework.org/spock/docs/2.4/all_in_one.md

## Pages

- `introduction`
- `getting_started`
- `spock_primer`
- `data_driven_testing`
- `interaction_based_testing`
- `extensions`
- `utilities`
- `parallel_execution`
- `modules`
- `release_notes`
- `migration_guide`
- `faq`
- `known_issues`
- `all_in_one`

## Versions

- Latest stable: 2.4
- Stable: 2.4, 2.3, 2.2, 2.1, 2.0, 1.3, 1.2, 1.1, 1.0
- Development: 2.5-SNAPSHOT
